text:
There was a farmer who loved his goats. He watched them every day. One day, a big storm hit.

All at once there was lightning. It blazed so bright, that he could see everything around him. The goats were frightened.

Their fur bristled. They jumped up and ran off. One ran straight up Mount Springfield!

In the center of the mountain he found a cave. It was big enough to sit in. It was warm. Every day he would sit there. He listened to the wind rustle through the leaves. He thought about life. He thought about friendship. He knew there wasn't anything living up there. Just stone.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
